sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n107630" key="u(pe/rkausis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ὑπέρκαυσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n107630.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">extreme virulence,</tr_> <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">τοῦ ἰοῦ</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0671.tlg001:31:2" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Philum.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Ven.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">31.2</biblScope></bibl></cit>.</sense> </entryFree>
